pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Trial Assessing Godex Carnitine Orotate Complex in Nonalcoholic Fatty Liver Disease Patients for Efficacy
pipelines.indication: Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en: the purpose of this clinical trial is to assess the efficacy and safety of Orotic Acid Carnitine Complex Capsules (Godex®) in comparison to a placebo control group in patients with Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD).

pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Trial Assessing Godex Carnitine Orotate Complex in Nonalcoholic Fatty Liver Disease Patients for Efficacy
pipelines.indication: Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en: the purpose of this clinical trial is to assess the efficacy and safety of Orotic Acid Carnitine Complex Capsules (Godex®) in comparison to a placebo control group in patients with Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD).

pipelines.trial_name: Immunogenicity and Safety of AdCLD-CoV19-1 OMI As a Booster: a COVID-19 Preventive Vaccine in Healthy Volunteers
pipelines.indication: COVID-19, Vaccines
pipelines.tech_summary_en: The immunogenicity and safety of AdCLD-CoV19-1 OMI (5.0x10\^10 VP (0.5 mL)/dose/Vial) administered as a booster in healthy adults aged 19 years old and above will be evaluated. Outcome assessment will be performed in comparison with Comirnaty Bivalent.

pipelines.trial_name: A Phase 3 Study to Evaluate Efficacy & Safety of Subcutaneous CT-P13 in Patients With Moderate to Severe Active Rheumatoid Arthritis
pipelines.indication: Moderately to Severely Active Rheumatoid Arthritis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a Randomized, Placebo-Controlled, Double-Blind, Parallel-Group, Phase 3 Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Subcutaneous CT-P13 in Patients with Moderately to Severely Active Rheumatoid Arthritis

pipelines.trial_name: Pivotal Study to Evaluate Efficacy and Safety of SP5M002 Inj. as Compared to Synovian Inj. in Patients With Mild to Moderate Knee Osteoarthritis
pipelines.indication: Osteoarthritis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a randomized, double-blind, multicenter, Active Controlled, pivotal clinical trial to assess the efficacy and safety of the novel hexamethylenediamine (HMDA) cross-linked hyaluronate intra-articular injection (SP5M002) compared with an active comparator, the 1,4-butanediol diglycidyl ether (BDDE) cross-linked hyaluronate (Synovian) in patients with knee osteoarthritis.

pipelines.trial_name: SkyVaricella® (NBP608) Vaccine With Lower Potencies in Healthy Children Aged 12 Months to 12 Years
pipelines.indication: Varicella (Chickenpox)
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
The goal of this study is to evaluate the safety and immunogenicity of an investigational varicella vaccine in children. Researchers will compare the investigational vaccine, NBP608, with licensed varicella vaccines. The study includes children aged 12 months to 12 years.

Approximately 780 participants will take part in this study. Participants will be randomly assigned to receive either the investigational vaccine (NBP608) or licensed varicella vaccines. Some participants will receive two doses, while others will receive one dose, according to the assigned study group.

Participants will:

Receive two subcutaneous injections of a study vaccine, administered approximately three months apart (if applicable).

Visit the study clinic seven times over approximately 15 months. Receive follow-up phone calls 7 days after each vaccination to monitor for safety.

pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Cellgram-LC Administration in Patients With Alcoholic Cirrhosis
pipelines.indication: Alcoholic Cirrhosis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This phase III clinical trial is designed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of autologous Mesenchymal Stem Cells (MSC) injected hepatic artery.

pipelines.trial_name: A Therapeutic Confirmatory Study of Epaminurad Versus Febuxostat in Gout Patients
pipelines.indication: Gout
pipelines.tech_summary_en: A phase 3 clinical trial to compare and evaluate efficacy and safety of epaminurad with febuxostat in gout patients.

pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of NTCB02-1 in Patients Who Require Parenteral Nutrition
pipelines.indication: Parenteral Nutrition
pipelines.tech_summary_en: A Randomized, Open-labeled, Multi-center, Active-controlled, Parallel-group Phase 3 Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of NTCB02-1 versus NTCB-C in patients who require parenteral nutrition

pipelines.trial_name: Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of JP-1366 in the Prevention of NSAIDs-Induced Peptic Ulcers
pipelines.indication: Peptic Ulcer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: The sutdy aims to to demonstrate the non-inferiority of JP-1366 10 mg compared to Lanston Capsule 15 mg in preventing NSAIDs-induced peptic ulcers and to compare/evaluate the efficacy and safety of JP-1366 10 mg.

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of Fabagal® (Agalsidase Beta) in Patients With Fabry Disease
pipelines.indication: Fabry Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en: Evaluate the safety and efficacy of Fabagal® developed by ISU ABXIS Co., Ltd., which has similar efficacy to active comparator (Agalsidase beta).

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety of SP-8203 (Otaplimastat) in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke Receiving Thrombolytic Standard of Care
pipelines.indication: Ischemic Stroke
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
This clinical study is designed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of the combination therapy of SP-8203 (otaplimastat) and thrombolytic standard of care in acute ischemic stroke patient.

As a standard of care, thrombolytic therapy (for instance, recombinant tissue plasminogen activator) will be administered. When reperfusion is not achieved in spite of thrombolytic therapy, endovascular therapy can be performed.

pipelines.trial_name: 뇌경색증 환자에서 자가혈청배양 자가중간엽 줄기세포를 이용한 세포 이식치료의 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Intravenous Administration of Autoserum-cultured Autologous Mesenchymal Stem Cells in Ischemic Stroke: A Single Center, Randomized, Open Label, Prospective, Phase 3 Study

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety of Pioglitazone Combination Therapy in Type 2 Diabetes Patients on a Background of Empagliflozin With Metformin
pipelines.indication: T2DM
pipelines.tech_summary_en: Phase 3 study to assess the Efficacy and Safety of CT-L03-301 in Type 2 Diabetes Patients with Insufficient Glycemic Control with Metformin and Empagliflozin Combination Therapy.

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of CMG190303 in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes and Dyslipidemia
pipelines.indication: Dyslipidemia, Type 2 Diabetes
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
The goal of this clinical trial is to learn if drug CMG190303 to treat Type 2 Diabetes and Dyslipidemia in adults. It will also learn about the safety of CMG190303. The main questions it aims to answer are:

-Primary Objectives:

1. To compare the change in HbA1c from baseline to 24 weeks between CMG190303 and Rosuvastatin
2. To compare the change in LDL-C from baseline to 24 weeks between CMG190303 and Dapagliflozin

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of DWP16001 in Type 2 Diabetic Nephropathy with Moderate Renal Impairment Patients
pipelines.indication: Type 2 Diabetic Nephropathy
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study aims to evaluate the efficacy and safety of DWP16001 in type 2 diabetic nephropathy with moderate renal impairment patients (CKD stage 3)

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluation the Efficacy and Safety of Mutiple Lenzumestrocel (Neuronata-R® Inj.) Treatment in Patients with ALS
pipelines.indication: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: ALSUMMIT is a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled, multi-center, parallel, phase III clinical trial to evaluate and confirm the efficacy and long-term safety of repeated Lenzumestrocel (Neuronata-R® inj.) treatment.

pipelines.trial_name: A Phase 3 Study of Efepoetin Alfa for Treatment of Anemia in Patients With Chronic Kidney Disease on Dialysis
pipelines.indication: Anemia of Chronic Kidney Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en: An investigator-blinded, randomized, multicenter, active-controlled Phase III study for the treatment of anemia in patients with CKD on hemodialysis

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Co-administration of JW0104+C2402 in Patients With Hypertension and Dyslipidemia
pipelines.indication: Hypertension, Dyslipidemia
pipelines.tech_summary_en: A Multi-center, Randomized, Double-blind, Parallel, Phase Ⅲ Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Co-administration of JW0104+C2402 in Patients with Hypertension and Dyslipidemia

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety of HUC3-637 in Patients With Primary Open Angle Glaucoma or Ocular Hypertension
pipelines.indication: Primary Open Angle Glaucoma (POAG), Ocular Hypertension
pipelines.tech_summary_en: A multicenter, randomized, single-blind, active controlled, phase III clinical trial to evaluate the efficacy and safety of HUC3-637 in patients with primary open angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension

pipelines.trial_name: 경·중등도의 본태성 고혈압 환자에서 Fimasartan(BR-A-657·K) 30mg의 혈압 강하 효과와 안전성을 위약과 비교하기 위한 무작위 배정, 양측눈가림, 다기관 임상시험(제3상)
pipelines.indication: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Multicenter, phase III Study to Evaluate the Antihypertensive Efficacy and Safety of Fimasartan (BR-A-657·K) 30mg Compared to Placebo in Patients with Mild to Moderate Essential Hypertension

pipelines.trial_name: Consolidation Chemotherapy for Locally Advanced Mid or Low Rectal Cancer After Neoadjuvant Concurrent Chemoradiotherapy
pipelines.indication: Rectal Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This trial is to assess the efficacy and feasibility of consolidation chemotherapy after neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy for locally advanced mid or low rectal cancer.

pipelines.trial_name: A Trial to Compare the Efficacy, Safety, Pharmacokinetics and Immunogenicity of HD204 to Avastin® in Advanced Non-squamous Non-small Cell Lung Cancer Patients
pipelines.indication: Lung Cancer, Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: In the SAMSON-2 study, the proposed biosimilar HD204 will be compared to its reference product EU-licensed Avastin®. The aim of the study is to demonstrate equivalence of HD204 and EU-licensed Avastin® in terms of efficacy, safety, pharmacokinetics and immunogenicity.

pipelines.trial_name: Consolidation Chemotherapy for Locally Advanced Mid or Low Rectal Cancer After Neoadjuvant Concurrent Chemoradiotherapy
pipelines.indication: Rectal Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This trial is to assess the efficacy and feasibility of consolidation chemotherapy after neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy for locally advanced mid or low rectal cancer.

pipelines.trial_name: Safety and Efficacy of Immuncell-LC With Gemcitabine in Resectable Pancreatic Cancer
pipelines.indication: Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma
pipelines.tech_summary_en: PURPOSE: This phase III clinical trial evaluates the efficacy and safety of adjuvant Immuncell-LC therapy combined with gemcitabine versus adjuvant gemcitabine single therapy after R0 or R1 resection in patients with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma.

pipelines.trial_name: Galinpepimut-S Versus Investigator's Choice of Best Available Therapy for Maintenance in AML CR2/CRp2
pipelines.indication: Acute Myeloid Leukemia
pipelines.tech_summary_en: To assess the safety and efficacy of galinpepimut-S (GPS) compared with investigator's choice of best available therapy (BAT) on overall survival (OS) in subjects with acute myeloid leukemia (AML) who are in second or later complete remission (CR2) or second or later complete remission with incomplete platelet recovery (CRp2).

pipelines.trial_name: Phase 3 Study of JP-1366: Efficacy and Safety of JP-1366 in Patients With Non-erosive Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease
pipelines.indication: Non-erosive Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study aims to evaluate the efficacy and safety of JP-1366 in Patients with NERD

pipelines.trial_name: 근치적 절제된 국소 진행성 식도 편평세포암 환자를 대상으로 한 순환 종양 DNA 미세잔존암 (MRD) 기반 보조항암요법에 대한 다기관, 무작위 배정, 3상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Multi-center, Randomized, Phase III Trial of Circulating Tumor DNA MRD-Guided Adjuvant Therapy for Curatively Resected Locally Advanced Esophageal Squamous Cell Carcinoma (MRD2START)

pipelines.trial_name: 담도암에서 근치적 목적의 수술적 절제 후 Gemcitabine, Capecitabine 병용 화학요법을 Capecitabine 단독 화학요법과 비교하는 다기관, 무작위 배정,  제 3상 연구
pipelines.indication: A Randomized, Multi-center Phase III Trial of Adjuvant Chemotherapy with Gemcitabine and Capecitabine Compared to Capecitabine Alone in Curatively Resected Biliary Tract Cancer

pipelines.trial_name: 고용량 무기 셀레늄의 백금 민감성 재발성 난소암, 나팔관암, 및 일차성 복막암의 치료에서 안전성 및 항암 유도 말초 신경병증 보호 효과에 대한 제 3 상 무작위 배정 임상 시험
pipelines.indication: Safety and Efficacy of high dose inorganic seLenium for preventing chemotherapy induced pEripheral Neuropathy in platINUM sensitive recurrent ovarian, fallopian, primary peritoneal cancer: phase III randomized controlled trial (SELENIUM trial)

pipelines.trial_name: 복막 전이를 동반한 진행성 또는 재발성 위암 및 위식도경계부암 환자에서 전신 항암요법과 함께한 복강 내 Paclitaxel 요법과 단독 전신 항암요법에 대한 다기관, 무작위, 공개 라벨 제 3상 연구 (PIPS-GC 003)
pipelines.indication:
Intraperitoneal Paclitaxel Plus Systemic Chemotherapy Versus Systemic Chemotherapy Alone for Advanced or Recurrent Gastric,
Gastro-oesophageal Junction Adenocarcinoma with Peritoneal Metastasis a multicenter, randomized, open-label, phase 3 trial (PIPS-GC 003)

pipelines.trial_name: 자궁경부암의 수술 후 보조 항암화학요법과 방사선치료의 비교: 3상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Adjuvant Chemotherapy Versus Radiotherapy For Postoperative Cervical Cancer (AFTER): A Phase 3 Trial

pipelines.trial_name: InDuctIon TREatment with SubCuTaneous Infliximab for Crohn's Disease
pipelines.indication: Inflammatory Disease, Disease Crohn, Bowel Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
Study Design:

A Prospective Multicenter Randomized Controlled, Open-label Non-inferiority Study to Investigate the Efficacy of Subcutaneous (SC) Infliximab (IFX) with and without Immunomodulators during Induction treatment in Moderate to Severe Crohn's Disease.

Primary endpoint:

The proportion of patients in corticosteroid-free clinical remission (as defined by a Crohn's disease activity index (CDAI)\<150) and endoscopic response (as defined by a simple endoscopic score for Crohn's disease (SES-CD) drop of at least 50%) at week 26.

Accrual and feasibility:

This study will enroll 158 subjects at approximately 20 sites in the Netherlands (peripheral and academic hospitals). The estimated enrollment is 0.5 patient/centre/month leading to an inclusion duration of 16 months once all centres are open. The first enrolment is anticipated in Q1 2021.

Treatment, dosage and administration:

Eligible patients will be randomized to receive SC IFX monotherapy (240mg at week 0 and week 2 and then 120mg every other week (EOW) OR SC IFX (240mg at week 0 and week 2 and then 120mg EOW) in combination with immunosuppression.

pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Study to Evaluate Efficacy and Safety of ASC and Fibringlue or Fibringlue in Patients With Crohn's Fistula
pipelines.indication: Crohn's Fistula
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a phase III study to evaluate the efficacy and safety of ASC(Autologous Adipose-derived Stem Cells) and Fibringlue or Fibringlue in Patients With Crohn's Fistula.

pipelines.trial_name: 항정신병 약물(들)의 안정적인 치료 용량으로 적절하게 조절되지 않는 치료 저항성 조현병 시험대상자에서 추가 치료(Add-on)로서 Evenamide 고정 용량 15 mg 및 30 mg BID 의 유효성, 안전성 및 내약성 평가를 위한 12 주 시점의 1 차 유효성 평가를 포함한 52 주, 전향적, 무작위배정, 이중눈가림, 위약대조, 평행군, 다기관, 제 3 상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A PHASE III, 52-WEEK, PROSPECTIVE, RANDOMIZED, DOUBLE-BLIND, PLACEBO-CONTROLLED, PARALLEL-GROUP, MULTI-CENTER STUDY, WITH A PRIMARY EFFICACY ENDPOINT AT 12 WEEKS, TO DETERMINE THE EFFICACY, SAFETY, AND TOLERABILITY OF FIXED DOSES OF 15 MG BID AND 30 MG BID OF EVENAMIDE AS ADD-ON IN PATIENTS WITH DOCUMENTED TREATMENT-RESISTANT SCHIZOPHRENIA, WHICH IS NOT ADEQUATELY CONTROLLED BY A STABLE THERAPEUTIC DOSE OF THE PATIENT’S CURRENT ANTIPSYCHOTIC MEDICATION(S)

pipelines.trial_name: Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of DW1807 in Perennial Allergic Rhinitis Patients With Asthma
pipelines.indication: Perennial Allergic Rhinitis Accompanied by Asthma
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study aims to compare the efficacy and safety of DW1807 and DW1807-R2 in patients with perennial allergic rhinitis and comorbid asthma. The primary objective is to demonstrate the superiority of DW1807 over DW1807-R2 in improving the reflective total nasal symptom score (rTNSS) after 4 weeks of treatment.

pipelines.trial_name: A Clinical Trial of STP0404 in Adults With HIV-1 Infection
pipelines.indication: HIV-1-infection
pipelines.tech_summary_en: The purpose of this study is to evaluate the antiviral effect, safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics of STP0404 in adult participants living with Human Immunodeficiency Virus Type 1 (HIV-1) infection.

pipelines.trial_name: Immunogenicity and Safety of Meningococcal Conjugate Vaccine (EG-MCV4) in Healthy Adults Aged 19 to 55 Years Old
pipelines.indication: Meningococcal Infections
pipelines.tech_summary_en: Phase 2/3 study to evaluate immunogenicity and safety in healthy adult participants following a single dose administration of Meningococcal (groups A, C, W-135, and Y) conjugate vaccine

pipelines.trial_name: Age-descending Study to Evaluate the Safety and Immunogenicity of the Cholera Conjugate Vaccine in Adults and Children
pipelines.indication: Cholera Vaccination
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This phase II study is intended to determine the immunogenicity and safety of single dose and two doses of OSP:rTTHc cholera conjugate vaccine (CCV) with or without alum adjuvant. The study will guide the future dosing schedule and formulation of CCV (with or without Aluminum phosphate adjuvant) expected to be needed in adults and children in cholera-endemic region.

pipelines.trial_name: Study to Evaluate Safety and Efficacy of ALLO-ASC-SHEET in Subjects With Dystrophic Epidermolysis Bullosa
pipelines.indication: Dystrophic Epidermolysis Bullosa
pipelines.tech_summary_en: After confirming eligibility, a single subject with four selected target lesions will receive both ALLO-ASC-SHEET and Vehicle control, three target lesions for ALLO-ASC-SHEET and the other target for Vehicle control, and which lesion to apply which IP treatment will be determined randomly at the time of enrollment using pre-designed block randomization scheme.

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Safety and Immunogenicity After MG1111(BARICELA Inj.) as 2nd Vaccination in 4 ~ 6 Year Old Healthy Children With a History of 1st Varicella Vaccination
pipelines.indication: Varicella
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
* Primary objective is to assess the safety of MG1111 until Day 42 using as 2nd vaccination
* Secondary objective to assess the immunogenicity and safety of MG1111 using as 2nd vaccination

pipelines.trial_name: A Phase 2b/3 Study of TPX-115 on Partial-thickness Rotator Cuff Tear
pipelines.indication: Partial Thickness Rotator Cuff Tear
pipelines.tech_summary_en: Rotator cuff tear is one of the most common shoulder diseases and conservative treatment is commonly used for tears involving ≤50% of tendon thickness. Since conventional conservative treatments are not fundamental to repair tendon tissue, there is a growing need of new therapy to improve structural outcome. This study assesses the safety and efficacy of allogeneic fibroblasts on partial-thickness rotator cuff tear. The primary outcome is change in Constant Score (CS) at 24 weeks after TPX-115 injection. Secondary outcomes include changes from baseline in CS, Visual Analogue Score (VAS) pain score, American Shoulder and Elbow Surgeons (ASES) score, Quick Disabilities of the Arm, Shoulder and Hand (Quick-DASH), Simple Shoulder Test (SST), and functional evaluations including Range of Motion (ROM) at 4, 12, 24 and 52 weeks after administration and structural evaluation using MRI at 24 and 52 weeks after injection.

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety Study of TPX-115 on Partial-thickness Rotator Cuff Tear
pipelines.indication: Partial Thickness Rotator Cuff Tears
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
The goal of this study is to evaluate the efficacy and safety of allogeneic dermal fibroblasts (TPX-115) compared to placebo in patients with Partial-Thickness Rotator Cuff Tear(PTRCT).

Primary endpoint is to evaluate the efficacy of TPX-115 compared to placebo, as measured by improvement in the Constant-Murley Score (CMS) in patients with PTRCT.

Secondary endpoints are:

* To evaluate functional (including shoulder pain) and structural improvements in the affected shoulder after administration of TPX-115 compared to placebo in patients with PTRCT
* To evaluate the safety and tolerability of TPX-115 in patients with PTRCT
* To assess the immunogenicity of TPX-115

pipelines.trial_name: Child-Pugh B 간세포암 환자에서 1차 면역관문억제제 기반 병용요법 실패 후 2차 치료로서 레고라페닙에 대한 제2상 연구
pipelines.indication: Regorafenib after Failure of First-Line Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor-Based Combination Therapy in Child-Pugh B Patients with HCC: A Phase 2 RECOMEND trial

pipelines.trial_name: 절제 불가능한 렌바티닙 실패 간세포암 환자에서 레고라페닙에 대한 다기관 단일군 제2상 연구
pipelines.indication: Regorafenib after Failure of Lenvatinib in Patients with Unresectable HCC: A Phase 2, Multicenter, Single-Arm Trial REVELANT trial

pipelines.trial_name: 근치적 치료가 불가능한 Child-Pugh B 간세포암 환자에서 1차 치료로서 렌바티닙에 대한 제2상 연구
pipelines.indication: First-Line Lenvatinib in Child-Pugh B Patients with HCC Unsuitable for Curative Treatment: A Phase 2 FINELAND Trial

pipelines.trial_name: 이전에 한가지 요법으로 치료받은 lenalidomide 불응성 다발골수종 환자에서 pomalidomide와 bortezomib, dexamethasone 병합요법의 효과 및 안전성에 대한 다기관 전향 제 2상 연구 (KMM 2405 연구)
pipelines.indication: Efficacy and safety of pomalidomidewith bortezomiband dexamethasone in lenalidomide-refractory patients after one prior line of therapy: prospective multicenter phase 2 study (KMM 2405 trial)

pipelines.trial_name: 만성이식편대숙주병에 대한 리툭시맙 바이오시밀러(트룩시마) 기반 초기치료의 안전성 및 효능에 관한 제2상, 단일기관 연구
pipelines.indication: A Phase 2 , single center, Safety and efficacy of rituximab biosimilar(Truxima®)-based first line treatment of chronic graft-versus-host disease

pipelines.trial_name: 기능성 소화불량증(functional dyspepsia) 환자를 대상으로 YH12852 경구 투여 시 최적의 유효성과 안전성을 갖는 용량 탐색을 위한 무작위배정, 이중눈가림, 위약대조, 다기관 제2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A Multicenter, Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled Dose-finding Phase 2 Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of YH12852 in Patients with Functional Dyspepsia

pipelines.trial_name: Imatinib, sunitinib과 regorafenib 치료에 모두 실패한 P-glycoprotein 발현이 낮은 전이성 또는 진행성 위장관 기질종양(GIST) 환자를 대상으로 한 oral paclitaxel (Liporaxel)의 제 II상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase II study of oral paclitaxel (Liporaxel) in GIST patients with a low P-glycoprotein expression after failure with imatinib, sunitinib and regorafenib

pipelines.trial_name: Study of the SCD411 Prefilled Syringe for Treating Adults With Wet Age-Related Macular Degeneration, Retinal Vein Occlusion, Diabetic Macular Edema, or Diabetic Retinopathy
pipelines.indication: Neovascular (Wet) Age-Related Macular Degeneration, Retinal Vein Occlusion, Diabetic Macular Edema, Diabetic Retinopathy
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a single-arm, multicenter study to evaluate clinical usability of a pre-filled syringe containing SCD411 in adult patients with neovascular Wet Age-Related Macular Degeneration (AMD), Retinal Vein Occlusion (RVO), Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), or Diabetic Retinopathy (DR)

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety Study of Isuzinaxib in Subjects With DKD
pipelines.indication: Diabetic Kidney Disease (DKD)
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study is a multicenter, double-blinded, randomized, placebo-controlled, dose-ranging study to evaluate the safety, tolerability, PK, and efficacy of Isuzinaxib compared with placebo in subjects with DKD.

pipelines.trial_name: Study of CU06-1004 in Patients With Daibetic Macular Edema
pipelines.indication: DME, Diabetic Macular Edema, Diabetic Macular Edema (DME)
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This phase 2b trial is a randomized, double-masked, parallel-group, multi-center study in approximately 156 patients with DME to evaluate the efficacy and safety of CU06-1004 orally administered once daily for 24 weeks. The study will have a 1:1:1 randomization (CU06-1004 200mg: CU06-1004 300mg: Placebo).

pipelines.trial_name: A Study to Evaluate Safety and Efficacy of KM-819 in Healthy Adults and Participants with Parkinson's Disease
pipelines.indication: Parkinson Disease
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
The goal of this study is to test KM-819 in halting or slowing the progression of Parkinson's disease.

The study evaluates the safety and tolerability of multiple ascending doses of KM-819 in healthy older adults and participants with Parkinson's disease.

pipelines.trial_name: Study of APX-115 in Contrast Induced Acute Kidney Injury in Subjects Undergoing PCI
pipelines.indication: Contrast Induced Acute Kidney Injury
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This phase 2 study is to assess the safety and efficacy of APX-115 active doses in Contrast Induced Acute Kidney Disease compared to placebo following multiple oral dosing in patients with undergoing percutaneous coronary intervention. It is anticipated that approximately 280 patients will be randomized into the study in a 1:1 ratio to 400 mg APX-115 (Isuzinaxib hydrochloride) or placebo arm.

pipelines.trial_name: Efficacy and Safety of SPC1001 in Patients With Essential Hypertension
pipelines.indication: Hypertension, Essential, Cardiovascular Diseases, Cardiology
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
\- Objective: This study aims to evaluate the safety and efficacy of the fixed-dose triple combination therapy (SPC1001) of candesartan, amlodipine, and indapamide in adult patients with essential hypertension compared to dual-component therapies of each ingredient for 8 weeks. Additionally, it seeks to confirm the contribution of each component at low doses.

\- Inclusion Criteria: Men and women aged 19 to 75 years whose blood pressure measured at the screening visit meets the following criteria.

\- Exclusion Criteria: Patients whose blood pressure measured at the screening and randomization visits meets the criteria of MSSBP ≥180 mmHg or MSDBP ≥110 mmHg, among other conditions.

\- Methods: This study is a multicenter, randomized, double-blind, parallel-group, phase 2b clinical trial to evaluate the safety and efficacy of the investigational drug after 8 weeks of administration.

Screening assessments will be conducted within 4 weeks prior to randomization, and patients who meet the inclusion and exclusion criteria at the screening visit will be enrolled in the study after providing informed consent. These participants will undergo a 2-week run-in period during which they will take a placebo and participate in a lifestyle modification program.

pipelines.trial_name: Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of SPC1001 Low in Patients With Essential Hypertension
pipelines.indication: Hypertension (HTN), NYHA Class III Heart Failure, NYHA Class IV Heart Failure, Diabete Mellitus
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
\- Objective: This study aims to evaluate the safety and efficacy of the fixed-dose triple combination therapy (SPC1001 Low) of candesartan, amlodipine, and indapamide in adult patients with essential hypertension compared to dual-component therapies of each ingredient for 8 weeks. Additionally, it seeks to confirm the contribution of each component at low doses.

\- Inclusion Criteria: Men and women aged 19 to 75 years whose blood pressure measured at the screening visit meets the following criteria.

\- Exclusion Criteria: Patients whose blood pressure measured at the screening and randomization visits meets the criteria of MSSBP ≥180 mmHg or MSDBP ≥110 mmHg, among other conditions.

\- Methods: This study is a multicenter, randomized, double-blind, parallel-group, phase 2b clinical trial to evaluate the safety and efficacy of the investigational drug after 8 weeks of administration.

Screening assessments will be conducted within 4 weeks prior to randomization, and patients who meet the inclusion and exclusion criteria at the screening visit will be enrolled in the study after providing informed consent. These participants will undergo a 2-week run-in period during which they will take a placebo and participate in a lifestyle modification program.

pipelines.trial_name: Copanlisib and Rituximab in Marginal Zone Lymphoma Patients
pipelines.indication: Marginal Zone Lymphoma
pipelines.tech_summary_en: For marginal zone lymphoma (MZL) Rituximab in combination with conventional chemotherapy is widely used for those patients who fail local therapy or do not qualify for such. Depending on the MZL subtype Rituximab/chemotherapy is able to induce in part long remissions, but do not prevent relapse later on. In addition, chemotherapy associated toxicity is often problematic in MZL patients, who are mostly of advanced age. Thus, chemotherapy - free approaches are highly attractive for this patient group. Rituximab single agent is a widely used chemotherapy - free approach in MZL, but was significantly inferior compared to Rituximab/chlorambucil in a large randomized prospective clinical trial in treatment naïve MZL with a CR rate of 56 % vs. 80%, respectively (P\<0.001). Thus, it is the major aim to develop chemotherapy - free approaches for MZL, which approach efficacy of Rituximab/chemotherapy combinations, but avoid chemotherapy associated toxicities. This in particular important in MZL as many physicians are reluctant to treat these often elderly patients with more intense treatments and prefer single agent therapies in these very often well and long responding lymphoma subtype. The PI3K inhibitor Copanlisib has shown high clinical activity in indolent B - cell lymphomas among them MZL. Based on these observations it is the aim of this study to test the toxicity and efficacy of Copanlisib in combination with the anti-CD20 antibody Rituximab in patients with newly diagnosed or relapsed MZL in need of treatment, who are not eligible or failed local therapy, following the assumption that this novel chemotherapy - free combination is significantly more effective than Rituximab single agent therapy and at least as efficient as Rituximab/chemotherapy, but avoids chemotherapy - related toxicity.

pipelines.trial_name: Neoadjuvant Lazertinib Therapy in EGFR-Mutation Positive Lung Adenocarcinoma Detected by BALF Liquid Biopsy
pipelines.indication: Non Small Cell Lung Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: Complete surgical resection is the standard treatment in early-stage lung cancer. However, the patients with early resected Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor(EGFR)-mutated lung cancers have high recurrence rate. The efficacy of neoadjuvant treatment by first-generation EGFR-Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitor(TKI) has been demonstrated, however, that of the third-generation EGFR-TKI(lazertinib) has not yet been fully investigated. The aim of this study is to evaluate the efficacy of neoadjuvant Lazertinib in resectable EGFR mutation-positive NSCLC and clinical application of extracellular vesicles(EVs) based BALF liquid biopsy to identify EGFR mutation without invasive tissue biopsy.

pipelines.trial_name: Secondary Cytoreductive Surgery (CRS) in Patients With Relapsed Ovarian Cancer Who Have Progressed on PARP Inhibitor Maintenance
pipelines.indication: Ovarian Cancer, Drug Related Neoplasm/Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a randomized phase II study of secondary cytoreductive surgery (CRS) in patients with relapsed ovarian cancer who have progressed on PARP inhibitor maintenance.

pipelines.trial_name: A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of JPI-547 in Platinum-resistant, Advanced/Relapsed Ovarian Cancer Subjects Previously Treated With a PARP Inhibitor
pipelines.indication: Ovarian Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of JPI-547, a PARP/TNKS dual inhibitor in Platinum-resistant, advanced/relapsed ovarian cancer subjects previously treated with a PARP inhibitor

pipelines.trial_name: To Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of JPI-547 in Combination With Bevacizumab as Maintenance Therapy in Relapsed Ovarian Cancer
pipelines.indication: Ovarian Cancer
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study aims to to evaluate the efficacy, safety, and pharmacokinetics of JPI- 547 with bevacizumab maintenance therapy in relapsed ovarian cancer patients

pipelines.trial_name: First-line Carboplatin and Paclitaxel in Combination With Pembrolizumab, Followed by Maintenance Pembrolizumab With or Without Nesuparib, in Patients With Newly Diagnosed Advanced or Recurrent MMR-proficient (pMMR) Endometrial Cancer
pipelines.indication: Endometrial Cancer, Recurrent Endometrial Carcinoma, Endometrial Carcinoma, Gynecologycal Cancer, Endometrial Neoplasms
pipelines.tech_summary_en:
The goal of this study is listed below.

Part A (Safety Run-in Phase) : To determine feasibility of pembrolizumab and nesuparib combination as maintenance therapy in patients with MMR-proficient advanced and recurrent endometrial cancer. Feasibility is defined as a dose-limiting toxicity (DLT) rate less than or equal to 33%.

Part B (Randomization Phase)

: To evaluate the efficacy of pembrolizumab and nesuparib combination/ pembrolizumab monotherapy as maintenance therapy in patients with MMR-proficient advanced stage and recurrent endometrial cancer. Efficacy will be assessed by investigator assessed progression free survival (PFS) as assessed by RECIST 1.1.

pipelines.trial_name: A Study to Evaluate the Effects of the Combination of GI-102 With GIB-7 on Biomarkers of Aging in Healthy Adults and Cancer Survivors
pipelines.indication: Cancer Survivors, Healthy Participant, Elderly
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This Phase 2a clinical study (GIANTS-1) aims to evaluate a novel dual-combination strategy using GI-102 and GIB-7 to address key pathological features of aging, including immunosenescence (the aging of the immune system), metabolic dysfunction, and gut-brain-muscle axis dysregulation.

pipelines.trial_name: A Study of IMC-001 in Subjects With Relapsed or Refractory Extranodal NK/T Cell Lymphoma, Nasal Type
pipelines.indication: Extranodal NK/T-cell Lymphoma, Nasal Type, Extranodal NK/T-cell Lymphoma
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a phase 2, Open-label, to investigate the efficacy and safety of IMC-001 in patients with Relapsed or Refractory extranodal NK/T cell lymphoma, nasal type

pipelines.trial_name: A Study of IMC-001 In Patients With Metastatic Or Locally Advanced TMB-H Solid Tumor
pipelines.indication: TMB-H, Histologically or Cytologically Proven Metastatic or Locally Advanced Solid Tumors
pipelines.tech_summary_en: The goal of this clinical trial is to determine the efficacy of IMC-001 in metastatic or locally advanced TMB-H solid tumor patients.

pipelines.trial_name: To Evaluate the Efficacy, Safety, Tolerability and Pharmacokinetic Profile of ABN401 in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors Harboring c-MET Dysregulation
pipelines.indication: Advanced Solid Tumors
pipelines.tech_summary_en: ABN401-003 is a Phase 2 clinical study to assess efficacy, safety, tolerability and pharmacokinetic profile of ABN401 (vabametkib) in specific populations of advance solid tumors with c-MET alterations as monotherapy.

pipelines.trial_name: Trial of the Combination of GX-188E Vaccination, GX-I7 and Pembrolizumab in Patients With Advanced, Resectable HPV Type 16 and/or 18 Positive Head and Neck Cancer
pipelines.indication: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma
pipelines.tech_summary_en: The study is open label, phase II clinical trial for the Combination of GX-188E HPV DNA Vaccine with GX-I7 or Pembrolizumab OR the Triple Combination of GX-188E HPV DNA Vaccine, GX-I7, and Pembrolizumab in Patients With Advanced, Resectable HPV Type 16 or 18 Positive Head and Neck Cancer.

pipelines.trial_name: 1차 면역항암제 병합치료에 실패한 진행성 간세포암 환자를 대상으로 한 렌바티닙 또는 레고라페닙의 2상 연구
pipelines.indication: A phase 2 study of lenvatinib or regorafenib in patients with unresectable or metastatic hepatocellular carcinoma who progressed on first-line immunotherapy-based combination therapy

pipelines.trial_name: 성인 재발/불응성 T-세포 림프모구백혈병/림프종에서 베네토클락 스와 데시타빈의 치료효과를 평가하는 2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase 2 clinical trial to evaluate the efficacy of VEnetoclax and Decitabine in relapsed/refractory adult T-acute lymphoblastic Leukemia/lymphoma

pipelines.trial_name: 고등급 췌장 신경내분비 종양 환자를 위한 2차 항암치료에서의 Lurbinectedin의 역할에 대한 단일군, 공개 라벨, 2상 임상 시험
pipelines.indication: Lurbinectedin as second-line treatment for patients with high-grade pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors: a single-arm, open-label, phase 2 trial

pipelines.trial_name: 전이성거세저항성전립선암(metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer, mCRPC) 환자를 대상으로 GI-101A과 SL-T10 병용요법의 안전성, 내약성과 예비유효성을 평가하기 위한 2 상, 다기관, 공개, 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase 2, multi-center, open-label study to evaluate the safety, tolerability and efficacy of combination regimen of GI-101A and SL-T10 in patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC)

pipelines.trial_name: 기관지폐포세척액 액상생검으로 검출된 절제 가능한 EGFR 유전자변이 양성 폐선암 환자에게 레이저티닙 선행항암요법 효과에 관한 전향적, 단일군 2상 임상 연구

A Randomized phase II clinical trial to evaluate the efficacy alternating mFOLFOX/mFOLFIRI chemotherapy regimen
as a second-line treatment for advanced biliary tract cancer

pipelines.indication: A pilot study to enter a multicenter phase II Trial of Primary Prophylaxis of Eflapegrastim during FOLFIRINOX or Modified FOLFIRINOX Chemotherapy in Locally Advanced or Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer Patients

pipelines.indication: A Phase II, open-label, single-arm study of mFOLFIRINOX in patients with metastatic neuroendocrine carcinoma

pipelines.indication: Neoadjuvant lazertinib with or without chemotherapy for patients with EGFR-mutated resectable non-small cell lung cancer (NeoLazer): a phase II, randomized, multi-center study

pipelines.indication: A phase II pragmatic study of lazertinib for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal seeding

pipelines.trial_name: 크렙스 회로와 관련된 유전자 변이를 가진 암종에서 bevacizumab과 erlotinib 병용 요법의 효과를 확인하기 위한 2상 임상시험(BRISK)
pipelines.indication: A phase II clinical trial of Bevacizumab plus eRlotinIb in patientS with advanced cancer having genetic alterations in Krebs cycle (BRISK)

pipelines.trial_name: 원발성 중추 신경계 림프종 환자에서 고용량 methotrexate 기반 면역화학요법 후 레날리도마이드 유지요법 효능평가를 위한 제 2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Phase II trial of lenalidomide maintenance after high–dose methotrexate-based immunochemotherapy in patients with primary central nervous system lymphoma

pipelines.trial_name: 뇌전이가 있는 치료받지 않은 EGFR 돌연변이 양성 비소세포폐암 환자에서 레이저티닙의 유효성을 평가하는 단일군, 단일기관, 2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A Phase II, Single-center, Single-arm trial to evaluate the efficacy of lazertinib in treatment-naive patients for EGFR mutated non-small cell lung cancer with symptomatic or asymptomatic brain metastasis

pipelines.trial_name: 수술이 가능한 HER2 음성 조기 유방암에서 PAM50 검사로 스크리닝한 HER2-enriched 아형에 대한 항-HER2 선행화학요법에 대한 유효성 평가를 위한 다기관, single arm, 2상 연구
pipelines.indication: Phase II trial of anti-HER2 treatment in HER2-enriched early breast cancer identified by PAM50, HER2E-PAM, PAMILIA study)

pipelines.trial_name: 절제 불가능한 대장암의 간전이 환자에서 HAI oxaliplatin + Systemic FOLFIRI와 Systemic FOLFIRI 치료시 절제 가능한 상태로의 전환율 비교를 위한 공개, 단일기관, 무작위 배정, 2상 연구
pipelines.indication: A randomized, open-label, single-center phase II study comparing conversion rate to surgery with hepatic aterial infusion chemotherapy to systemic chemotherapy in patients with non resectable liver-only colorectal metastases

pipelines.trial_name: 복막전이로 진단된 진행성 위암 환자에서 복강 내 파클리탁셀 투여와 전신 카페시타빈 및 옥살리플라틴 병용요법후 전환수술의 효과와 안전성을 평가하기 위한 제 II 상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase II study evaluating the efficacy and safety of conversion surgery after intraperitoneal paclitaxel in combination with systemic capecitabine and oxaliplatin chemotherapy in advanced gastric cancer patients diagnosed with peritoneal dissemination

pipelines.trial_name: 절제 가능한 식도암 환자에서 양성자를 이용한 선행 동시 방사선항암요법을 평가하는 제 2상 임상 연구
pipelines.indication: A phase II study of neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy with protons for resectable esophageal cancer

pipelines.trial_name: 이전 치료 병력이 없는 진행성 요막관암에서 modified FOLFIRINOX의 전향적 다기관 2상 임상 연구
pipelines.indication: A Multicenter Prospective Phase II Study of modified FOLFIRINOX for 1st line treatment for advanced urachus cancer

pipelines.trial_name: 이전에 치료받지 않은 중추신경계 재발 고위험군 광범위 큰 B세포 림프종이 있는 시험대상자에서 레날리도마이드 + R-CHOP 화학요법(Lenalidomide-R-CHOP)의 안전성 및 유효성을 평가하기 위한 제2상 다기관 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Phase II study of lenalidomide-R-CHOP for patients with diffuse large B cell lymphoma who are at high risk of central nervous system relapse

pipelines.trial_name: 처음 진단된 이식이 불가능한 원발성 중추신경계 림프종 환자에서 표준치료 후 lenalidomide/rituximab유지요법에 대한 제 2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Phase II study of lenalidomide/rituximab maintenance for transplatation ineligible patients with primary CNS diffuse large B-cell lymphoma

pipelines.trial_name: 추가 집중 관해유도 항암화학요법이 부적합한 재발불응 급성골수성백혈병 환자에서 azacitidine 단독요법에 대한 제2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Single agent azacitidine for pre-treated acute myeloid leukemia patients not expecting help of further intensive re-induction chemotherapy: a phase II trial

pipelines.trial_name: HER2 발현 절제불가능 국소진행성 또는 전이성 암환자에서의 Herceptin biosimilar (Samfenet®)와 임상의가 선정한 약제와의 병용요법의 안전성, 유효성 평가를 위한 공개, 전향적, 제 2상 시험
pipelines.indication: Open label, prospective phase II study to investigate the efficacy and safety of Trastuzumab biosimilar (Samfenet®) plus treatment of physician’s choice (TPC) in patients with HER2-positive unresectable locally advanced or metastatic solid tumor

pipelines.trial_name: 이전에 두가지 이상의 HER2 표적 치료를 받았던 HER2 양성 재발성 혹은 전이성 유방암 환자에서 에리불린 단독요법과 에리불린 + SB3 (트라스투주맙 바이오시밀러) 병용요법을 비교하는 무작위배정 제 2상 임상 연구
pipelines.indication: Randomized, Open label, Multi-Center, Phase II Trial of Eribulin with or without SB3 (Trastuzumab-biosimilar) in Patients With HER2-overexpressed Recurrent or Stage IV Breast Cancer Who Have Received at Least 2 Prior HER2-directed Regimens

pipelines.trial_name: 백금 기반 치료 후 진행한 진행성 흉선상피종양의 치료로서 페메트렉시드를 평가하는 제II상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase II study of Pemetrexed after progression of platinum-based treatment for advanced thymic epithelial tumors

pipelines.trial_name: 절제불가능한 국소진행성 비강/부비동암에서 docetaxel/5-FU/cisplatin 선행항암화학요법과 예방적 pegteograstim을 병용하는 다기관2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase II trial of neoadjuvant docetaxel/5-FU/cisplatin in combination with prophylactic Pegteograstim in unresectable, locally advanced nasal cavity/paranasal squamous cell carcinoma (SCC)

pipelines.trial_name: Determine the Dose-dependent Efficacy and Safety of EC-18 in Patients With Moderate to Severe Atopic Dermatitis
pipelines.indication: Atopic Dermatitis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of oral administration of dose-dependent EC-18 for 16 weeks in patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis

pipelines.trial_name: A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of IN-115314 Ointment in Mild to Moderate Atopic Dermatitis Adult Patients
pipelines.indication: Mild to Moderate Atopic Dermatitis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study aims to evaluate the efficacy and safety of IN-115314 Ointment in mild to moderate atopic dermatitis adult patients

pipelines.trial_name: Safety and Efficacy of AR1005 in Patients with Lewy Body Disease
pipelines.indication: Lewy Body Dementia
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This study is a phase 2a, single-center, double-blind and randomized clinical trial that evaluates the safety and efficacy of AR1005 administration in 60 patients with cognitive impairment due to Lewy body disease. The study evaluates whether the administration of AR1005 in patients with cognitive impairment due to Lewy body disease has the effect of improving cognitive function, behavioral psychological symptoms, cognitive fluctuations, movement, brain waves and brain activity.

pipelines.trial_name: 면역성 혈소판감소증(ITP)의 1차 치료법에 대한 탐색적 2상연구: 1차 표준 치료에 대한 반응 후 ITP 재발 예방을 위한 SKI-O-703 유지 시의 유효성 및 안전성을 평가하기 위한 무작위배정, 이중 눈가림, 위약 대조, 다기관, 연구자주도 임상시험
pipelines.indication: Exploratory Phase 2 Study of First Line Treatment for Newly Diagnosed Immune Thrombocytopenia (ITP): A Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled, Multicenter, Investigator-initiated Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of SKI-O-703 Maintenance after Response to First-line Standard Treatment for the Prevention of ITP Recurrences

pipelines.trial_name: 재발/불응성 면역혈소판감소증 환자를 대상으로 보르테조밉 (벨킨®)의 효과와 내약성을 평가하는  제2상 임상시험
pipelines.indication: A phase 2 study to investigate efficacy and safety evaluation of bortezomib in patients with relapsed/refractory immune thrombocytopenia  (BORRELIA)

pipelines.trial_name: Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of DWN12088 in Patients With IPF
pipelines.indication: Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis
pipelines.tech_summary_en: This is a randomized, double-blinded, placebo-controlled multicenter study to evaluate the safety and efficacy of DWN12088 in patients with Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis.

technology.indication: Exploratory Phase 2 Study of First Line Treatment for Newly Diagnosed Immune Thrombocytopenia (ITP): A Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled, Multicenter, Investigator-initiated Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of SKI-O-703 Maintenance after Response to First-line Standard Treatment for the Prevention of ITP Recurrences

Exploratory Phase 2 Study of First Line Treatment for Newly Diagnosed Immune Thrombocytopenia (ITP): A Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled, Multicenter, Investigator-initiated Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of SKI-O-703 Maintenance after Response to First-line Standard Treatment for the Prevention of ITP Recurrences

Exploratory Phase 2 Study of First Line Treatment for Newly Diagnosed Immune Thrombocytopenia (ITP): A Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled, Multicenter, Investigator-initiated Trial to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of SKI-O-703 Maintenance after Response to First-line Standard Treatment for the Prevention of ITP Recurrences
